results.title: RS PRO M3 Standoff, 15 mm Body, 8 mm Body, Steel | RS
results.snippet: The correct size standoff is selected and inserted into or aligned with pre-drilled holes in the PCB. A metric screw or a nut is then fastened onto or into the thread of the standoff to lock and hold it securely in place. The nuts and screws can be released and retightened as required.
